title: ESM Packaging, Exports, Executable Entry, Artifact Inspection, and Platform Support · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed maintainer review reconstructs esm packaging, exports, executable entry, artifact inspection, and platform support from revision, runtime, command, unknown input, validation result, request identity, response fixture, promise state, cache decision, output, abort, cleanup, and recovery evidence.
